# UI/UX Instructions

Design quality target:
- premium mobile utility
- modern food/travel assistant
- clean and trustworthy
- inspired by Airbnb, Uber Eats, Apple Wallet, Linear

Primary device:
- mobile browser

Desktop behaviour:
- centred mobile app shell
- do not stretch the app across the full desktop width

UX principles:
- Every screen should have a clear primary action.
- Every async action must have loading, success, and error states.
- Use empty states instead of blank screens.
- Keep copy short and clear.
- Make the order flow obvious.
- Optimise for one-handed mobile use.
- Avoid visual clutter.
- Avoid generic admin/dashboard layouts.

Visual style:
- rounded cards
- generous spacing
- clear hierarchy
- soft shadows
- readable typography
- strong contrast
- food/travel-friendly feel

Accessibility:
- Minimum 44px tap targets.
- Keyboard accessible controls.
- Semantic HTML where possible.
- Visible focus states.
- Do not rely on colour alone.
- Use accessible labels for upload/camera controls.
